title: Design dotyaml Rust crate API
description: Define API and behavior to mirror Python dotyaml (dotenv preload, env interpolation, flatten to env with prefix, override flag, list/boolean/null handling); prepare crate naming and docs.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

custom.beads_close_reason: Abandoned dotyaml crate approach; moving to single .taskulus.yml config file strategy.
custom.beads_notes: Drafted crate design in docs/dotyaml_rust.md: options struct, load/export semantics matching Python dotyaml, error cases, testing strategy, Taskulus integration notes.
